creator: andersonvieira@freebsdbrasil.com
text:
Hello team. I'd like to insert a FreeBSD group the section Groups FreeBSD.

"If you know of a FreeBSD user group not listed here, please fill out a problem report in category Documentation->Website with the following information:"

A URL for the user group's website.
http://www.freebsdbrasil.com

An email contact address of a human in charge, for use by our visitors and website administrators.
andersonvieira@freebsdbrasil.com

A short (one paragraph) description of the user group.
The goal of this community is to exchange knowledge and experience about the FreeBSD operating system and OS disclosure. Will not be tolerated lack of respect with any participant in the group. Welcome, everyone.

Thanks everyone.

Best regards.

Anderson Vieira
